title: thalesia sedii
side_effects: Thalesia sedii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, headaches, and stomach upset due to its high concentration of alkaloids. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, which may be exacerbated by individual tolerance. In severe cases, excessive consumption of Thalesia sedii can cause respiratory failure, seizures, and even coma. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to minimize the risk of these side effects.
